Seo.title: IDA — Enterprise Decision & Digital Workforce Operating System
Seo.description: IDA gives leaders a live view of their entire organization — accounts, people, projects, and decisions — so they can decide with confidence.
Seo.ogTitle: IDA — See Your Organization. Decide with Confidence.

hero.title: IDA shows leaders their entire organization — so they can decide with confidence.
hero.subtitle: One place to see accounts, people, projects, and decisions — updated from real business activity.

what.question: What is IDA?
what.answer: IDA is the system that shows leaders everything happening across their organization — accounts, people, projects, and decisions — in one place.

who.question: Who is it for?
who.answer: CEOs and leadership teams at large enterprises who need clarity before making important decisions — not another chat window for individuals.

whyNot.question: Why not ChatGPT or Copilot?
whyNot.answer: Those tools answer one-off questions. IDA remembers your organization, connects the dots across accounts and projects, and prepares executive-ready briefings.

outcome.question: What do you get?
outcome.answer: A live view of what needs attention, what is at risk, and what to do next — built from real business activity, not generic AI responses.

enterprise.label: Enterprise-ready
enterprise.detail: Built for regulated industries — energy, telecom, and infrastructure.

human.label: Humans in control
human.detail: IDA recommends. Leaders decide. Every action has an owner.

audit.label: Full audit trail
audit.detail: Every briefing, decision, and change is recorded and traceable.

demo.title: What you will see in the demo
demo.subtitle: Three minutes. One story. No setup required.

executiveBrief.title: Executive Brief
executiveBrief.desc: What needs attention today — issues, risks, and recommended actions.

livingOrganization.title: Living Organization
livingOrganization.desc: How accounts, people, and projects connect across your business.

knowledge.title: Organizational Knowledge
knowledge.desc: Everything IDA knows about an account — emails, meetings, decisions.

whoFor.title: If you lead a large organization, IDA is for you.
whoFor.subtitle: Energy, telecommunications, infrastructure, and any enterprise where decisions depend on knowing the full picture — not searching through inboxes.
